data.title: Mercury Insurance highlights cybersecurity during National Cybersecurity Awareness Month due to increasing cybercrime rates - FBI reported over 859,000 complaints.
data.description: For National Cybersecurity Awareness Month, it's crucial to safeguard yourself. Mercury Insurance acknowledges the surge in cyberattacks. The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) reports over 859,000 cybercrime complaints. Stay vigilant online.

data.title: Czech company H₂ Global Group gets approval for Alzheimer's therapy clinical study with molecular hydrogen.
data.description: In Prague on October 23, 2025, the European innovation frontrunner, H₂ Global Group, revealed that its branch, H₂ Medical Technologies, has been given the green light by The State Institute for Drug Control (SÚKL) to commence a clinical examination concentrating on molecular hydrogen.

data.title: Lightricks launches LTX-2 an open-source AI video model with 4K at 50fps, 10-sec sequences, and consumer-grade GPU support.
data.description: A cutting-edge open-source foundation model, LTX-2, has been launched in New York on Oct. 23, 2025. It combines synchronized audio and video generation, boasting native 4K fidelity at 50 frames per second, enabling 10-second sequences, while emphasizing radical efficiency. The system is unique for running on consumer-grade GPUs and is designed to be production-ready.

data.title: Frost & Sullivan awards top organizations at the 2025 Gala for innovation and excellence in global industries.
data.description: Commending notable achievements in various global sectors, Frost & Sullivan recognized exceptional companies worldwide during the 2025 Best Practices Recognition Gala in San Antonio on Oct. 23. The prestigious event took place at the JW Marriott Tucson Starr Pass Resort & Spa, showcasing leadership and innovation in different industries.

data.title: Project Tomorrow's 22nd annual report reveals student optimism for AI use in classrooms, emphasizing need for dialogue and educator training.
data.description: The 22nd yearly update advocates for fostering communication between students and teachers, emphasizing the need for further education for instructors as students increasingly incorporate artificial intelligence (AI) into their daily routines. This report was released in Irvine, California on October 23, 2025, by Project Tomorrow, a prominent education nonprofit group.

data.title: LA partners with Cisco and nonprofits to launch public Wi-Fi, addressing internet access gaps.
data.description: The collaboration between the City of Los Angeles, tech company Cisco, and various local nonprofits has led to the introduction of a new public Wi-Fi network. This initiative aims to bridge the internet access divide and enhance the connectivity of Los Angeles' public infrastructure in preparation for upcoming major events. This partnership marks a significant step forward in improving access to digital resources for residents and businesses in the city.

data.title: AuditBoard and EY US expand partnership to revolutionize risk management with cutting-edge technology and expertise.
data.description: A recent collaboration has been established to offer exceptional visibility and assurance in a challenging risk environment by merging top-tier technology with extensive industry expertise. This strategic partnership, announced in San Diego on October 23, 2025, during the 2025 Audit & Beyond event, aims to enhance risk management capabilities. AuditBoard, recognized as the leading global platform utilizing artificial intelligence, plays a key role in this partnership, promising groundbreaking solutions for managing risks. The joint initiative underscores the commitment to address the complexities of risk in today's landscape by leveraging state-of-the-art technology.

data.title: Fireblocks acquires Dynamic to speed up on-chain adoption for fintechs & enterprises, providing a platform for onboarding users.
data.description: In New York, a new comprehensive developer platform has been launched, catering to enterprises, fintechs, payment platforms, and startups. This platform allows for the quick onboarding of users on-chain, providing seamless and secure on-chain consumer experiences. This includes services such as stablecoin accounts, DeFi trading, and yield generation. This initiative aims to streamline these processes and facilitate a more efficient and user-friendly experience for individuals and businesses in the digital finance sector.
Rubio: Israel has reached confirmation of America's firm commitment to Israel's security and communication with partners to implement the historic peace plan

data.title: U.S. health workers brought back from furlough for Medicare, A.C.A. enrollments. Costs covered by user fees from researchers.
data.description: Federal employees will resume work on Monday, with the expenses covered by fees gathered from researchers.

data.title: 15th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards winners announced, honoring global business achievements. Celebrating all industries worldwide.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 23, 2025, the Globee® Awards recognized exceptional business achievements within various industries, sizes, and regions globally. The awards, known for their prestigious and inclusive nature, attract participants from around the world. This event serves as a platform to honor outstanding businesses and professionals, highlighting their success on a global scale.

data.title: uBreakiFix opens new store in Palmdale, offering repairs for tech devices. Located at 2315 E. Palmdale Blvd., Suite E.
data.description: A new store in East Palmdale is now offering quick and cost-effective repairs for phones, tablets, laptops, and other devices. This store, opened by leading tech repair provider uBreakiFix® by Asurion, is located at 2315 E. Palmdale Blvd., Suite E. The opening took place on October 23, 2025.

data.title: IFPA urges action on World Psoriasis Day to address mental health link; raising awareness on October 29, 2025.
data.description: The International Federation of Psoriasis Associations (IFPA) is calling for the acknowledgment of the strong connection between psoriasis and mental health, emphasizing the need for proactive measures to avoid its harmful consequences. Located in Stockholm, on October 23, 2025, IFPA highlights the significance of World Psoriasis Day observed annually on October 29th to promote understanding and support for individuals affected by this condition. By recognizing the interplay between psoriasis and mental well-being, IFPA aims to address the far-reaching impacts of this issue.

data.title: 13th Annual Globee Awards call for entries in San Francisco starting Oct. 23, 2025, recognizing excellence in every role and industry.
data.description: Honoring outstanding performance in all positions and sectors worldwide, the Globee® Awards recently unveiled the invitation for submissions. The prestigious awards, known for their data-driven approach and global recognition, attract widespread participation from various industries. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025, in San Francisco.

data.title: Debby Gomulka introduces Marrakech Textile Collection inspired by global heritage, launching Oct. 14, 2025.
data.description: Debby Gomulka, a designer from Charleston, has introduced a new collection of sustainable luxury textiles called the Marrakech Collection. Inspired by global heritage, these eco-luxury textiles are launched by Provenance Lee Interiors based in Charleston, South Carolina. The collection aims to bridge the gap between modern elegance and traditional craftsmanship. This line features unique materials and designs that promote sustainability in the textile industry. The debut of the Marrakech Collection signifies a step towards environmentally conscious fashion choices.

data.title: New dormitory in downtown Elgin, Glunz Hall, repurposes a 1960's bank into a residence and design studio for architecture students.
data.description: Glunz Hall in Elgin, Illinois has been transformed into a hybrid residence and design studio for graduate architecture students. The building, originally a mid-century bank headquarters, now serves as a showcase of adaptive reuse. The project was completed on October 23, 2025. The Future Architect Fund, a non-profit organization committed to assisting the next generation of architects, led the initiative. This development signifies a creative solution, with a blend of living and workspaces for students.

data.title: Merck chooses eschbach's Shiftconnector to enhance manufacturing with digital tools for transparency and agility.
data.description: In Boston on October 23, 2025, eschbach announced that Merck (NYSE: MRK), also known as MSD outside the United States and Canada, has chosen Shiftconnector to enhance digital tool utilization in manufacturing. This move aims to improve efficiency by incorporating Shiftconnector into its existing visual system. This decision reflects Merck's commitment to embracing innovative technologies in its operational processes.

data.title: CoComelon & Headspace launch "Wiggle to Wind Down" podcast to aid parents during daylight savings. New music & sleep products introduced. Los Angeles, Oct. 23, 2025. #Kids #Parents #Sleep
data.description: CoComelon, a popular children's brand, has recently introduced new music such as "Cozy and Cuddly" and calming sleep products as a part of its "CoComelon Can Help" bedtime program. The brand, based in Los Angeles, made this announcement on Oct. 23, 2025, through PRNewswire. This initiative comes at a crucial time for parents as they prepare for the challenging bedtime routines, offering assistance with innovative products and music aimed at creating a peaceful bedtime environment for kids.
